title.en: Clarke leaves strong Scotland legacy but exit brings sense of relief
title.zh-CN: 克拉克留下了强大的苏格兰遗产，但退出让人松了一口气

summary.en: In his seven-year reign Steve Clarke took Scotland out of the wilderness but could not find the promised land of knockout major championship football, writes Tom English.
summary.zh-CN: 汤姆·英格利希（ Tom English ）写道，在他七年的统治期间，史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）将苏格兰带出了荒野，但找不到淘汰大满贯足球的承诺之地。

title.en: 27 flights, 24 matches: How Fifa's president is jetting around World Cup
title.zh-CN: 27个航班， 24场比赛：国际足联主席如何在世界杯周围飞行

summary.en: Gianni Infantino has clocked up thousands of air miles across North America so far.
summary.zh-CN: 到目前为止， Gianni Infantino已经在北美各地飞行了数千英里。

title.en: Crystal Palace and Sunderland top Premier League World Cup goals chart
title.zh-CN: 水晶宫和桑德兰顶级英超联赛世界杯进球榜

summary.en: Crystal Palace and Sunderland lead the Premier League’s World Cup scoring charts after the 2026 group stage, ahead of Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City.
summary.zh-CN: 在2026年小组赛之后，水晶宫和桑德兰在英超联赛的世界杯得分榜上领先，领先于阿森纳、利物浦和曼城。

title.en: What you need to know about England's opponents DR Congo
title.zh-CN: 您需要了解的英格兰对手刚果民主共和国的信息

summary.en: England will face DR Congo in the round of 32. Here is what you need to know about them.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰将在32轮比赛中面对刚果民主共和国。以下是您需要了解的有关他们的信息。

title.en: Job done - but England will not win World Cup unless they improve
title.zh-CN: 工作完成-但英格兰队除非进步，否则不会赢得世界杯

summary.en: England did their job topping the group - but they can forget winning the World Cup if they do not improve, writes Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）写道，英格兰队在小组中名列前茅，但如果他们不进步，他们可能会忘记赢得世界杯。

title.en: How to win a World Cup penalty shootout
title.zh-CN: 如何赢得世界杯点球大战

summary.en: We have a look at what can be learned from every World Cup penalty taken in a shootout ever.
summary.zh-CN: 我们来看看从有史以来枪战中的每一次世界杯点球中可以学到什么。

title.en: Best team, moments, matches and players of World Cup group stage
title.zh-CN: 世界杯小组赛阶段的最佳球队、时刻、比赛和球员

summary.en: As the World Cup group stages come to an end, BBC Sport reporters pick their highlights so far.
summary.zh-CN: 随着世界杯小组赛阶段的结束， BBC体育记者挑选了迄今为止的亮点。

title.en: South Africa look to lay ghosts of 2010 to rest
title.zh-CN: 南非期待2010年的幽灵安息

summary.en: South Africa play their first ever World Cup knockout game against Canada, 16 years after Bafana Bafana passed up the chance to progress at a tournament held on home soil.
summary.zh-CN: 在Bafana Bafana放弃了在本土举行的比赛中取得进步的机会16年后，南非首次与加拿大进行世界杯淘汰赛。

title.en: Kane becomes England's top World Cup scorer - and now chases other greats
title.zh-CN: 凯恩成为英格兰世界杯的顶级得分手-现在追逐其他伟人

summary.en: Harry Kane became England's all-time leading World Cup scorer with his 12th goal in the win against Panama on Saturday, but how does he compare to other country's greats?
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在周六对阵巴拿马的比赛中以第12个进球成为英格兰历史上领先的世界杯得分手，但他与其他国家的伟大球员相比如何？

title.en: Colombia denied late winner in enthralling draw with Portugal
title.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚否认在葡萄牙的迷人平局中迟到的赢家

summary.en: Colombia and Portugal play out one of the games of the tournament, as both sides qualify for the World Cup last 32 following a gripping 0-0 draw.
summary.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚和葡萄牙参加了本届锦标赛的一场比赛，双方在0-0平局之后都有资格参加世界杯的最后32场比赛。

title.en: DR Congo come from behind to book last-32 tie with England
title.zh-CN: 刚果民主共和国从后面来预订与英格兰的最后一个32领带

summary.en: DR Congo set up a World Cup last-32 meeting with England by reaching the knockouts for the first time as they come from behind to beat Uzbekistan in their final group-stage game.
summary.zh-CN: 刚果民主共和国队在最后一场小组赛中击败乌兹别克斯坦队，首次击败英格兰队，与英格兰队举行了世界杯的最后一场32场比赛。

title.en: 'Get rid of VAR!' Rooney unhappy Sanchez goal ruled out
title.zh-CN: '摆脱VAR ！ “鲁尼不高兴桑切斯的进球被排除在外

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundit Wayne Rooney cannot believe Davinson Sanchez's goal for Colombia against Portugal was ruled out because the defender was offside by a toe.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育世界杯专家韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）不敢相信戴维森·桑切斯（ Davinson Sanchez ）在哥伦比亚对阵葡萄牙队的进球被排除在外，因为这名后卫的脚趾越位。

title.en: 'He's that guy!' Pundits praise 'brilliant' Bellingham
title.zh-CN: （就是他！ “权威人士称赞”出色的贝灵厄姆

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Micah Richards and Wayne Rooney praise Jude Bellingham's "desire and hunger" to perform on the biggest stage, after the England midfielder produces a goal and an assist in...
summary.zh-CN: BBC体育世界杯专家米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）和韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）称赞裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）在最大的舞台上表演的“欲望和渴望” ，此前这位英格兰中场球员打进了一个进球，

title.en: Kane and Bellingham proved again why they are key players - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: Kane和Bellingham再次证明了他们为什么是关键球员- Tuchel

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel says Harry Kane and Jude Bellingham proved once again why they are key players for England, after both men scored in a 2-0 win over Panama which sees Tuchel's team win Group L at the...
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）和裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）再次证明了他们为什么是英格兰的关键球员，两人都在2-0战胜巴拿马的比赛中得分，图切尔的球队在

title.en: Croatia beat Ghana to reach knockout stages
title.zh-CN: 克罗地亚击败加纳进入淘汰赛阶段

summary.en: Nikola Vlasic scores a late header as Croatia booked their place in the World Cup last 32 with victory over already-qualified Ghana in Philadelphia.
summary.zh-CN: 尼古拉·弗拉西奇（ Nikola Vlasic ）得分较晚，因为克罗地亚队在过去的32届世界杯中以战胜费城已经合格的加纳队而获得了他们的位置。

title.en: Tuchel worried about right-back situation

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel says he is "worried" about England's right-back crisis after Jarell Quansah became the latest in the position to suffer injury.

title.en: Salah an injury doubt for Egypt's last-32 tie

summary.en: Egypt captain Mohamed Salah is a doubt for Friday's World Cup last-32 tie against Australia after suffering a hamstring injury.

title.en: Spain's Williams criticises tackle that injured him

summary.en: Nico Williams criticises Uruguay's Nicolas de la Cruz for a "completely unnecessary" tackle that injured the Spain winger.

title.en: Tuchel vows 'the bigger the game, the bigger England will be'

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel has vowed that "the bigger the game, the bigger England will be" after a laboured 2-0 victory over Panama sent them into knockout stages of the World Cup as Group L winners.

summary.en: Yoane Wissa scored two as the Democratic Republic of Congo fought from behind to beat Uzbekistan 3-1 in Atlanta and book a round-of-32 clash against England.

title.en: Colombia finish as Group K winners with Portugal second after entertaining draw

summary.en: Colombia secured top spot in Group K after an entertaining 0-0 draw against Portugal in their final group game, as Roberto Martinez's side finished runners-up.
